problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Microbiome. Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
